testcase.name: TC18_verifyInvalidJobDetailsAreRejectedUsingECP

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Validation error should display for numeric-only company name expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only job title expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only location expected [true] but found [false], Validation error should display for numeric-only required skill expected [true] but found [false]
